# Ecommerce Stack Solutions - LLMs.txt
# AI crawler accessibility map for ecomstacksolutions.com

## Site Info
Name: Ecommerce Stack Solutions
URL: https://ecomstacksolutions.com
Description: Expert reviews of Shopify apps, email marketing, and conversion tools for ecommerce
Founder: Malik
Founded: 2026

## Content Sections

### Pillar Pages
- /pillar/shopify-apps - Shopify app reviews
- /pillar/email-marketing - Email marketing platforms
- /pillar/reviews-ugc - Review and UGC tools
- /pillar/conversions-cro - Conversion optimization
- /pillar/fulfillment - Fulfillment software
- /pillar/analytics - Ecommerce analytics

### Blog Articles
- Coming soon: Ecommerce tool reviews and comparisons

### Legal Pages
- /legal/privacy - Privacy Policy
- /legal/terms - Terms of Service
- /legal/disclosure - Affiliate Disclosure
- /legal/about - About Us

## Affiliate Programs
We review and link to: Shopify, Klaviyo, Privy, Judge.me, Loox, ConvertKit, Omnisend, Gorgias, Recharge, Yotpo

## Structured Data
This site implements JSON-LD schema:
- WebSite
- Organization
- Article
- Product (review)
- FAQPage
- BreadcrumbList
